Title: User Registration and Login Attempt
Description: The user will navigate to the ecommerce playground website, register a new account by filling out the registration form, agreeing to the privacy policy, and successfully creating the account. After registration, the user will log out, then attempt to log in using the registered email and password. The instructions also include handling a login failure scenario where the entered credentials do not match, verifying the appropriate warning message is displayed.

Title: User Registration and Login
Description: The user will navigate to the ecommerce website, register a new account by filling out the registration form with personal details, accept the privacy policy, and submit the form. After successful registration, the user will log out and then log back in using the newly created credentials to verify access to the account dashboard.

Title: Search and Add iPhone to Cart
Description: The user will navigate to the ecommerce playground homepage, verify the page is loaded, search for 'iPhone' products, verify the search results are displayed, select the first iPhone product, add it to the shopping cart, confirm the success message, open the cart, and verify that the iPhone product is present in the cart summary.

Title: User Login Verification
Description: The user will navigate to the e-commerce website, access the login form under the 'My Account' menu, enter their email and password credentials, and successfully log in. The instructions include verifying the visibility of the login form, confirming the entered email and password fields, clicking the login button, and ensuring that the My Account dashboard is displayed upon successful authentication.

Title: Execute API Call
Description: The user will perform an API call by following the provided instructions, enabling them to execute a specific API request on the webpage or application.

Title: Verify Account Dashboard and Access Wish List and Order History
Description: The user will log into their account on the e-commerce website using valid credentials, verify that the My Account dashboard is displayed, and then navigate through the Wish List and Order History sections to confirm that these pages are accessible and correctly loaded.
